title: canthium aurantiacum
intro: Canthium aurantiacum, also known as the forest toad tree, is a medicinal plant species native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Canthium aurantiacum include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
